zh.Holkham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可霍爾哈姆
zh.Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登
zh.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun於1060年出生在蘇格蘭。他於大約1105年與Sara DE BIDUM在英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1156年之前在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾拉文登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun于1060年出生在苏格兰。他于大约1105年与Sara DE BIDUM在英国巴金哈姆爾拉文登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1156年之前在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bidun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): habitational name, probably from Baydon (Wiltshire). The placename may have meant ‘hill associated with a woman named Bēage’ (a personal name derived from Old English bēag ‘ring, bracelet, torque’ + Old English dūn). The surname is pronounced /'baidən/.

History: The surname Biden has a long history in East Meon (Hampshire), recorded there from 1327 until at least the 1840s. — Joe Biden, the 46th president of the US, is of Irish, English, and French descent. His mother’s Jean (Catherine Eugenia) Finnegan entire family tree traces back to Ireland, with some of the ancestors named Blewitt (see Blewett ).

variants.name: Blewett
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French bleuet, blouet ‘bluish’, a diminutive of bleu ‘blue’, more specifically ‘pale, pallid, wan’, or ‘fair-haired, golden-haired’. Compare Blew , Blewitt , and Bluett .

History: The Norman Ralph Bloet is mentioned in Domesday Book (1086) as lord of the manor of Hinton in Hampshire, recorded in 1246 as Henton Bluet (modern Hinton Blewett). From the late 12th century onward many Anglo-Norman knights acquired estates in Ireland. Ralph's presumed descendants, Thomas and Ralph Bluet, held lands in counties Cork and Limerick before and after 1254, and are ancestors of the modern Irish families named Bluett, Blewett, and Blewitt. In 1850, following the Irish Potato Famine in Ireland (1845–49), Patrick Blewitt, a son of Edward Blewitt of Ballina, County Mayo, migrated to North America, his whole family joining him in 1851 to settle in Scranton PA. Joe Biden (see Biden ), the 46th president of the US, is Edward's great-great-great grandson.

en.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun was born in 1060, in Scotland. He married Sara DE BIDUM about 1105, in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died before 1156, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun est né en 1060, à Écosse. Il a épousé Sara DE BIDUM environ 1105, à Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé avant 1156, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun wurde 1060 in Scotland geboren. Er hat um 1105 in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England Sara DE BIDUM geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb vor 1156 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun è nato il nel 1060 nel Scotland. Lui sposato Sara DE BIDUM circa 1105, nel Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 1156, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Holkham, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクホールクハム
ja.Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidunは1060年にスコットランドで生まれた。約1105年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドンでSara DE BIDUMと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1156年以前にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun(은)는 1060년 스컷랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1105년 영국 벅잉함실르 레이븐던에서 Sara DE BIDUM(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1156년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun nasceu em 1060, em Scotland. Ele casou-se com Sara DE BIDUM aproximadamente 1105, em Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1156, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun родился в 1060 г. в местности Шотландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Sara DE BIDUM около 1105 г. в местности лавендон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер перед 1156 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Halenade de Bidun nació en 1060, en Scotland. Se casó con Sara DE BIDUM aproximadamente 1105, en Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 1156, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
